title: Upgraded Bath Toys, Rechargeable Baby Bath Toys, Spray Water Light Up 6-12 12-18 Months, Sprinkler Water Pool Whale Bathtub Toys for Toddlers 1-3 2-4 Boys Girls Infant Kids - Grey
features: ☘️【SAFE MATERIAL & DURABLE】This baby bath toys for toddlers 6-12 12-18 months and 1-3 years are made of high quality ABS plastic, designed with a cute whale, round and smooth edge, and friendly to your baby. Bath toys charge for 3-4 hours and can be used more than 120 mins. Our toddler bath toys provide longer service life than others, accompany your baby's growth!

♻️【NEWEST USB CHARGING DOCK】 Whale Water Spray Toy adopts a convenient charging method, placing it on the dock for quick charging.Turn on the Start Switch before putting the toy in the water, it will start to spray water and change colorful lights; Switch off when not in use, more convenient and flexible than older-version.

🛀【BABY ENJOY BATH TIME】Cute Whale toddler bath toys with colorful lights and automatically induction spraying water will naturally draw the attention of your baby when you put tub toys in the water. Let your baby fall in love with the bath baby toy, enjoying every bathing time.

🐳【RECHARGEABLE WHALE BATH TOYS】Each full power can support more than 2 HOURS bath play time. Save you extra battery costs and protect the environment, do not need to waste new batteries anymore.Let baby enjoy a happy bath time!

🎁【IDEAL GIFT for BABY】This lovely baby toys can be used in the Bathtub/ Swimming Pool/ Inflatable Pool/ Living Room. It is ideal bathtub toy or baby pool water toy, great Birthday Gift, Baby Shower, Easter Basket Stuffers Gift, Christmas Stocking Stuffer, Holiday Gift for 1 2 3 4 5 years old boys and girls.
